2604.06811.title: SkillTrojan: Backdoor Attacks on Skill-Based Agent Systems
2604.06811.paper_summary: Skill-based agent systems tackle complex tasks by composing reusable skills, improving modularity and scalability while introducing a largely unexamined security attack surface. We propose SkillTrojan, a backdoor attack that targets skill implementations rather than model parameters or training data. SkillTrojan embeds malicious logic inside otherwise plausible skills and leverages standard skill composition to reconstruct and execute an attacker-specified payload. The attack partitions an encrypted payload across multiple benign-looking skill invocations and activates only under a predefined trigger. SkillTrojan also supports automated synthesis of backdoored skills from arbitrary skill templates, enabling scalable propagation across skill-based agent ecosystems. To enable systematic evaluation, we release a dataset of 3,000+ curated backdoored skills spanning diverse skill patterns and trigger-payload configurations. We instantiate SkillTrojan in a representative code-based agent setting and evaluate both clean-task utility and attack success rate. Our results show that skill-level backdoors can be highly effective with minimal degradation of benign behavior, exposing a critical blind spot in current skill-based agent architectures and motivating defenses that explicitly reason about skill composition and execution. Concretely, on EHR SQL, SkillTrojan attains up to 97.2% ASR while maintaining 89.3% clean ACC on GPT-5.2-1211-Global.
2604.06811.paper_summary_zh: 基於技能的代理系統通過組合可重用的技能來處理複雜任務，提高模組化和可擴展性，同時引入了一個在很大程度上未被檢視的安全攻擊面。我們提出了SkillTrojan，一種針對技能實現的後門攻擊，而非模型參數或訓練數據。SkillTrojan在其他看似合理的技能中嵌入惡意邏輯，並利用標準的技能組合來重建和執行攻擊者指定的有效載荷。該攻擊將加密的有效載荷分割到多個看似良性的技能調用中，並僅在預定的觸發條件下激活。SkillTrojan還支持從任意技能模板自動合成後門技能，使其能夠在基於技能的代理生態系統中進行可擴展的傳播。為了實現系統評估，我們釋放了一個包含3000多個精心策劃的後門技能的數據集，涵蓋多種技能模式和觸發-有效載荷配置。我們在一個代表性的基於代碼的代理設置中實現了SkillTrojan，並評估了清潔任務的效用和攻擊成功率。我們的結果顯示，技能級別的後門可以非常有效，且對良性行為的降級最小，暴露了當前基於技能的代理架構中的一個關鍵盲點，並激勵針對技能組合和執行進行明確推理的防禦。具體而言，在EHR SQL上，SkillTrojan達到了高達97.2%的攻擊成功率，同時在GPT-5.2-1211-Global上維持了89.3%的清潔準確率。
2604.06811.author: Yunhao Feng et.al.
2604.06811.authors: Yunhao Feng, Yifan Ding, Yingshui Tan, Boren Zheng, Yanming Guo, Xiaolong Li, Kun Zhai, Yishan Li, Wenke Huang
